name: Baked Chilies Rellenos Dgsv43a
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chiles on a baking sheet. Broil 3 inches from the heat for 15 minutes or until blackened and charred, turning once.
2. Place chiles in ice water, and chill for 5 minutes. Drain well; peel and discard skins. Cut a 4-inch slit in the side of each chile; discard seeds and set aside.
3. Combine ricotta cheese, corn, green onion, pepper, and half of garlic; stir well. Stuff each chile with 1/3 cup of the mixture. Arrange chiles in a small baking dish. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
4. Coat a small saucepan with cooking spray; place over medium heat until hot. Add remaining garlic and chopped onion; sauté for 3 minutes. Add cumin and oregano; sauté for 1 minute. Stir in salt and tomatoes. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for an additional 10 minutes, stirring frequently. Pour sauce over chiles and serve.
